_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your local repoPath. Never commit config.json — it contains local paths.
readinessCriteria: Has a clear title describing the feature or bug
Has acceptance criteria or expected behavior described in the body
Is not blocked by another open issue
Does not have a 'needs-discussion' or 'on-hold' label
Contains enough technical detail to implement without asking questions
draftCommentTemplate:
This issue needs more detail before it can be automatically implemented.

Reasoning: {reasoning}

Please add the missing information and re-apply the `auto:ready` label when ready.

_Posted by ATHF automation loop._
